title: Hiring Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners
company: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
